headline: 1 Services Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. These firms have helped their customers unlock huge efficiencies, so it’s no surprise the industry has posted a 16% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 7.7 percentage points.
